pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.5 to 3.0.5 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Spring Framework 6 APIs used in the new version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.5 enforces Java 17 as the minimum runtime; compiling or running with Java 11 will fail.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to use Java 17 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target 17, the compiler might default to an older version or fail to process Java 17 features correctly in the context of the new Spring Boot parent.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure annotation processor paths for MapStruct, Lombok, and their binding to ensure correct code generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: MapStruct and Lombok require specific annotation processor ordering and binding to generate code correctly; missing this configuration leads to compilation errors or missing generated classes.
